Object.name: PromptTipoLancamentoVarchar
Object.description: Consulta de Cadastro de Tipo Lançamento

Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMain.Height = 493 Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &LctTip1 = nullvalue(&LctTip1) &LctAtuEst1 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst1) &LctGerFin1 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin1) &LctAtuPro1 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTTIP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &LctTip2 = nullvalue(&LctTip2) &LctAtuEst2 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst2) &LctGerFin2 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin2) &LctAtuPro2 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTTIP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &LctTip3 = nullvalue(&LctTip3) &LctAtuEst3 = nullvalue(&LctAtuEst3) &LctGerFin3 = nullvalue(&LctGerFin3) &LctAtuPro3 = nullvalue(&LctAtuPro3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTTIP' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Consulta de Cadastro de Tipo Lançamento' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaLinhaTam.Call(&linhaNumeric, &TamanhoNumeric) TableMain.Height = &TamanhoNumeric Grid.Rows = &linhaNumeric EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Select = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter &LctCodNomePequeno10 = trim(str(LctCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &InOutLctCod = LctCod Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSeleciona' 4 do 'localizaTipoLancamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctTip1.Visible = False &LctAtuEst1.Visible = False &LctGerFin1.Visible = False &LctAtuPro1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctTip2.Visible = False &LctAtuEst2.Visible = False &LctGerFin2.Visible = False &LctAtuPro2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctTip3.Visible = False &LctAtuEst3.Visible = False &LctGerFin3.Visible = False &LctAtuPro3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTTIP' &LctTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' &LctAtuEst1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' &LctGerFin1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' &LctAtuPro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTTIP' AND not &LctTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctTip1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTTIP' AND not &LctTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctTip2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTTIP' AND not &LctTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctTip3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUEST' AND not &LctAtuEst3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuEst3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTGERFIN' AND not &LctGerFin3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctGerFin3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTATUPRO' AND not &LctAtuPro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctAtuPro3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &RetoLctCod.IsValid do 'localizaTipoLancamento' EndEvent Sub 'localizaTipoLancamento' For Each Order EmpCod, LctCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where LctCod = &RetoLctCod &InOutEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &InOutLctCod = &RetoLctCod &LctCodNomePequeno10 = trim(str(LctCod)) Return Exit EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Consulta de Cadastro de Tipo Lançamento
